scope: Add and verify a production app/public guide boundary handoff after the repo established the canonical workspace route and public Student/Teacher guide mode.
selected_figma_slice: Production app and public guide route/data/permission/state boundary handoff.

node_touched.name: Prototype / 15 / Production app and public guide boundary
changes: Added a public website guide-mode card for / and generated public-companion/.
Added an authenticated workspace card for /workspace, /workspace.html, /api/auth/me, /api/student/dashboard, /api/submissions/:id/evidence, and /api/submissions/:id/evidence/upload.
Added a surface boundary matrix distinguishing public guide content, workspace app state, internal alpha/account pages, and stakeholder option artifacts.
Added an implementation acceptance contract for guide toggle checks, workspace role checks, and the next rebuild target.
Corrected collapsed text heights and lower acceptance-card bullet-row overflow after initial screenshot/readback verification.

guardrails: Student/Teacher guide toggle is not authentication.
Workspace requires a session and D1 role scope.
Workspace must not expose raw storage IDs.
Alpha/account pages are not normal public navigation.
Stakeholder options are not guide modes.
Drive-missing state must be truthful until credentials are configured.
shared_plugin_data.next_rebuild_action: Add browser-visible role-pending and permission-denied states in workspace, then verify live Drive upload/download after secrets are configured.

metadata_verification.summary: Returned the final frame context after text-height and bullet-row corrections.

library_and_search_verification.summary: Confirmed library access for the active file and available design system libraries.
Found only the local Component / Status Pill / Overridden as directly relevant; no reusable variables or styles were required for this annotation board.

implementation_handoff: Rebuild should use node 124:2 when adding browser-visible role-pending and permission-denied workspace states, keeping public guide mode separate from app auth, permission, API, evidence-redaction, and audit logic.

validation.summary: Created node 124:2, fixed collapsed text heights and bullet-row overflow, and read back zero suspicious clipped text nodes plus zero child overflow.
Confirmed the final production app/public guide boundary handoff context.
Artifact registry and structured run manifest parsed as JSON.
Whitespace check passed with line-ending warnings only.
